title: docs: update README — 2026-07-11

pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by app-update-metrics.yml.)

gist.headline: Daily News Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the README with the latest news from the hive.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the Latest News section in the project README.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page current with recent project announcements.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot acting as a news reporter or updating a bulletin board, representing the automated README news refresh.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning a fresh news clipping to a wooden bulletin board. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head hands her the paper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
